title: 🐟Friendly AxolotlS🐟
description: Axolotls wont kill your fishes anymore, they even have a new diet...
body:
Ever wanted to keep cute axolotls as companions in Minecraft but worried about them eating your fishes? Look no further! This datapack solves that problem. It also adds some other features

![owo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VC9RnJoq/images/1eae48affe762455886125e80a7893449401577c.png)

**Frienship Power:** Axolotls will no longer attack friendly mobs, which includes:
- Salmon, Cod, Tropical Fish
- Squid, Glow Squid
- Tadpoles

**Enemies:** Now they will attack and hunt down
- Drowneds
- Guardians & Elder Guardian
- Spiders & Cave Spider
- Silverfish, Endermites & Bees
- Pufferfish

**Better Diet:** Now you can feed and breed axolotls using
- Tropical Fish 
- Tropical Fish Bucket
- Spider Eyes 
- Fermented Spider Eyes
